'''Dorn Tlo''' was a famous [[Kel Dor/Legends|Kel Dor]] [[Baran Do]] Sage Master who contacted the [[New Jedi Order]] in [[30 ABY/Legends|30 ABY]] and sent them [[Galactic Republic/Legends|old Republic-era]] records from the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to attest to the Baran Do's long history. He would later speak of the Baran Do's belief that the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] was a necessary evil and that following the [[Potentium]]'s views could be dangerous for the Order and [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Behind the scenes==
Dorn Tlo was a Kel Dor for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.
